family.title: Thermal behavioral cartography
family.summary: A sensor engine tracking distinct moving presences, overlap complexity, residual paths, target locks, and camera-driven audio.

provenance.conversation_title: Interface Animation Creation / surveillance and behavioral cartography continuation
provenance.source_notes: Recovered from the approved FIELD STATION: MAGPIE hi-fi surveillance, thermal pass-through, and overhead alley iterations. Figures are deliberately non-duplicate; overlapping targets remain separately tracked. Audio is generated from the same subject-density, movement-progress, and stereo-position variables driving the image.
